title: Salty Fluffy Argentinian Napa Cabbage Empanadas
description: A plant-based-friendly twist on traditional Argentinian empanadas, featuring marinated napa cabbage and a fluffy, salty pastry crust. Perfect for a nostalgic and satisfying snack or meal.

ingredients.name: napa cabbage
ingredients.notes: marinate in 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp salt, and 1 tsp black pepper for at least 30 minutes

instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add warm water, olive oil, and apple cider vinegar, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Let dough rest for 10 minutes, then divide into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place 1-2 tbsp of marinated napa cabbage in the center of each circle.
Fold dough in half to form a half-moon shape, pressing edges to seal.
Brush tops with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
